extraction.one_line_summary: GILBERT Philippe attacked on the Oude Kwaremont creating a dangerous Quickstep group, then survived SAGAN Peter's late move and crash on the final Paterberg to win solo
tactical_patterns: GILBERT Philippe's Oude Kwaremont attack forced Quickstep numerical advantage when Sky's ROWE Luke and MOSCON Gianni were distanced
BOONEN Tom's mechanical before Taaienberg neutralized Quickstep's own domestique, exposing risky all-leader group composition
SAGAN Peter waited until final Paterberg to move, revealing his team lacked resources to force earlier selection
TERPSTRA Niki sat on for final kilometers then lost sprint to VAN AVERMAET Greg, showing fatigue from earlier work

rider_signals.GILBERT Philippe: positive: attacked Oude Kwaremont to create winning break, survived mechanical chaos to win solo
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: crashed on Paterberg during his only decisive attack, timing too late for recovery
rider_signals.BOONEN Tom: negative: mechanical before Taaienberg on his final Ronde destroyed ceremonial farewell
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: positive: out-sprinted TERPSTRA Niki for second despite less Quickstep team support throughout race
rider_signals.TERPSTRA Niki: neutral: sat in well but lacked sprint freshness for podium, suggesting he did more work than VAN AVERMAET
rider_signals.VANMARCKE Sep: neutral: present in finale sprint group but couldn't challenge for podium positions
rider_signals.NAESEN Oliver: negative: crashed with SAGAN Peter on Paterberg, ending podium chances
